overall.description: A first-person walk through a rain-soaked cyberpunk city at night, featuring neon-lit skyscrapers, digital billboards, and wet reflective streets. The footage is from a video game engine (Cyberpunk 2077), showcasing cinematic lighting with prominent cyan and magenta neon hues reflecting off wet surfaces.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered pedestrian walkway alongside multi-lane street

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the wet sidewalk beneath cyan neon-lit building facades

notable_agents.action: walking past the camera with an umbrella, heading in the opposite direction

entered.detail: tall building facade with horizontal cyan neon strip lighting and dark metallic panels
rain-soaked concrete pavement reflecting cyan and pink neon lights
tall digital advertising screens on distant skyscrapers displaying colorful animations
illuminated street lamps with white light and glowing cylindrical bases

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with a steady walk along a rain-soaked sidewalk in a futuristic city. A massive building with horizontal cyan neon lighting dominates the left side, while the right side reveals a multi-lane street with sparse traffic. The wet pavement reflects the vibrant neon lights, and a pedestrian with an umbrella passes by in the opposite direction.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban intersection with pedestrian crosswalk and palm tree landscaping

events.description: exits covered sidewalk and enters open intersection to cross the wet asphalt street
turns right at the intersection corner to proceed along the new street

agents.ego_description: crossing the wet asphalt intersection and turning right onto a new street lined with palm trees

entered.detail: yellow and black striped pedestrian crossing painted on wet asphalt
tall palm trees with illuminated trunks lining the street corner
massive vertical digital advertisement screen on building facade displaying animated content

segments.scene_description: The camera leaves the covered sidewalk and enters a wide urban intersection, crossing yellow-striped crosswalks on the rain-slicked asphalt. Palm trees line the corner as the camera turns right, revealing massive digital billboards on the right side. The open intersection provides a broader view of the surrounding skyscrapers.

scene_state.functional_zone: commercial street with large digital advertising displays and transit access

events.description: passes illuminated NCART transit station entrance with glowing signage

agents.ego_description: proceeding along the sidewalk past illuminated storefronts, vending machines, and digital displays

notable_agents.action: walking ahead with an umbrella, moving in the same direction as the camera

entered.detail: transit station entrance with illuminated 'NCART' signage and glass facade
bright yellow automated vending machines with glowing displays
illuminated blue warning sign displaying 'CAUTION NCPD' in neon letters

segments.scene_description: Walking along the new street, the camera passes towering vertical digital billboards on the right displaying vibrant advertisements. The sidewalk features an NCART transit station entrance and bright yellow vending machines. A pedestrian with an umbrella walks ahead in the same direction, and the camera passes a blue 'CAUTION NCPD' warning sign.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered pedestrian plaza with transit access and landscaped vegetation

events.description: enters a more enclosed plaza area with increased vegetation and overhead pedestrian walkways

agents.ego_description: walking through the covered plaza area toward a metro station entrance with landscaped surroundings

entered.detail: landscaped bushes and trees in illuminated planters providing greenery to the urban environment
glass and steel entrance structure to underground metro system with illuminated signage
elevated pedestrian bridge with cyan neon lighting connecting buildings above

segments.scene_description: The final segment transitions into a semi-covered pedestrian plaza with moderate vegetation in illuminated planters. The camera approaches a metro station entrance while passing under an elevated pedestrian walkway with cyan neon lighting. The environment feels more enclosed and sheltered from the rain compared to the open street, with tiled pavement replacing the concrete sidewalk.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from a rain-slicked city sidewalk through a wide urban intersection and into a sheltered pedestrian plaza. It begins with a steady walk past a massive building dominated by horizontal cyan neon lighting, where the wet pavement reflects vibrant hues as a pedestrian with an umbrella passes by. As the camera leaves the covered walkway, the scene opens into a broad intersection with yellow-striped crosswalks and palm trees before turning right toward towering digital billboards. The movement continues along a street lined with bright yellow vending machines and an NCART transit station, passing a blue NCPD warning sign while following another pedestrian. Finally, the environment shifts from the open, rain-soaked street into a semi-covered plaza with illuminated planters and tiled pavement, ending as the camera passes under a cyan-lit elevated walkway toward a metro station entrance.
